text.title: AWS Monitoring, Alerting, and Disaster Recovery Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: tier-map
step.action: Enumerate tiers (API, compute, DB, queue) + their key metrics.

step.name: compose-dashboards
step.action: One dashboard per tier; 6-8 widgets; 5-min period.

step.name: set-alarms
step.action: Author tiered alarms with thresholds + SNS topics.

step.name: pick-dr-strategy
step.action: Match strategy to RTO bucket: backup/pilot/warm/active.

step.name: schedule-drills
step.action: Quarterly chaos drill from cold; document RTO actual vs target.
